<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Read one ordered observe-event log page without projecting it into graph state.

## Import

```ts
import { readObserveEventLogPage } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function readObserveEventLogPage(
	log: AppendLogStorageTier<ObserveEventFrame<T>>,
	opts: AppendLogReadOptions = {},
): Promise<ObserveEventLogPage<T>>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `log` | `AppendLogStorageTier<ObserveEventFrame<T>>` | log value used by the helper. |
| `opts` | `AppendLogReadOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `Promise<ObserveEventLogPage<T>>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { readObserveEventLogPage } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/storage/observe-event-log.ts`
